title: FERTICOOP-GO-Innovacions per adaptar-se a les millors tècniques disponibles (MTD’s) en el sector agrari cooperatiu català
description: A final results sheet summarizing the FERTICOOP-GO project which developed and evaluated innovative tools for managing livestock manure and agronomic fertilisation within Catalan agricultural cooperatives. The project aimed to optimise nutrient use, reduce greenhouse gas and ammonia emissions, and integrate digital platforms for sustainable fertilisation recommendations.
